Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai kyunki mera endurance hi mere bimar maa-baap ki aakhri umeed hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role duty and the weight of the family's survival.
text: Tumhare maa-baap aur gaon ki poori umeed tum par tiki hai, aur is zimmedari ke aage tumne apne aap ko kisi bhi thakan ya aaram ka haq dena chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Aaram karunga toh ghar mein chulha kaise jalega? Yahan shehar mein meri identity ko koi samajhta nahi, ulta mazaak udate hain. Par main kisi se kuch keh nahi sakta, log kamzor samjhenge. Isliye main chup-chap double shift karta hoon. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai, chahe andar se main khatam hi kyun na ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the stigma fear smoothly by focusing on the feared consequence.
text: Log kamzor na samajh lein, is darr se tum apne andar ki ghutan kisi se keh bhi nahi paa rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Kise kahoon? Yahan har koi apni life mein mast hai. Aur mere gaon walo ki halat dekhkar lagta hai ki mera farz bas unki problem solve karna hai. Main raat-raat bhar jaagta hoon kaam ke liye. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai, varna meri biradari kya kahegi ki beta shehar jake unhe bhool gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational conflict embedded in the duty.
text: Ek taraf tum shehar walon ke beech akele pad gaye ho jo tumhe nahi samajhte, aur doosri taraf biradari ke taane ka darr tumhe sone bhi nahi de raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Sone ka time waise bhi kahan hai. Main disaster ke agle din se hi idhar udhar bhag raha hoon. Ek saal ho gaya, par lagta hai jaise ek hi lambi raat chal rahi hai. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai, yehi meri reality ban gayi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration aspect to validate how long they've been carrying this.
text: Ek poora saal nikal gaya us disaster ko, aur us pehle din se lekar aaj tak, tumhari zindagi mein jaisa ek pal ka aaram nahi aaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Aaram ki sochna hi selfish lagta hai. Jab mere bimar maa-baap tent mein reh kar mere paise ka wait karte hain, toh main yahan movie kaise dekh lun dosto ke sath? Unhe mera mazaak udane do. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the emotional toll of carrying this burden alone in the city.
text: Jab tumhari aakhon ke samne maa-baap ka face aata hai aur wahi doosri taraf yahan dosto ke mazaak sunne padte hain, us isolated moment mein andar se kya feeling aati hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Aisa lagta hai ki main koi alien hoon. Na main yahan ka hoon, na main ab gaon lout sakta hoon. Ek ajeeb sa akelepan lagta hai, jaise main poori duniya se cut-off ho gaya hoon. Par kisi psychologist ke paas nahi ja sakta, family kya sochegi. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the grief and loss of belonging connected to their duty.
text: Lagta hai in dono duniya ke beech faskar tumhare andar ek gehra dukh aur akelepan baith gaya hai, jaise tumhari khud ki koi jagah nahi bachi aur tum puri tarah akele pad gaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Meri jagah bas ek money machine ki reh gayi hai. Ghar walo ka dosh nahi hai, unhone sab khoya hai disaster mein. Par mera wajood toh bas unki needs tak reh gaya hai na. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai isliye sab chup kar sehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate structural endurance and separate worth from the outcome.
text: Itni badi tabahi ke baad naye shehar mein aakar apne poore khandan ka akele sahaara banna, yeh ek bohot bada bojh hai jo tum utha rahe ho. Tumhara yeh akela aur totally exhausted mehsoos karna bilkul valid hai, isme tumhari koi kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Par yeh kamzori feel hoti hai. Main andhar se khokla ho chuka hoon. Kabhi kabhi shift se aate waqt metro mein mujhe rona aata hai akele mein, par main aankhein ponchh leta hoon. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai taaki wahan kisi ko pata na chale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational boundary setting (hiding crying).
text: Apne maa-baap ki taqat bane rehne ke liye, tum metro mein akele aaye us dukh ko bhi kisi tak pahunchne nahi dete.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Nahi pahunchne de sakta na. Unke paas mere siwa kuch bacha hi nahi hai. Par ab lag raha hai ki main kab tak yeh endurance jhel paunga. Andar hi andar itna bhari feel ho raha hai aur Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about migrant breadwinners.
text: Bahar shehar jaa kar akele apne parivaar ko support karne walo mein yeh structural endurance bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin is ghutan ke baare mein koi bolega nahi kyunki izzat aur zimmedari sabse upar hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Sahi kaha. Izzat bohot matter karti hai wahan. Par is akelepan mein ghutte hue duty nibhana bahut thaka raha hai. Ab main kya karoon ki main aage tak bina ruke lade reh sakun aur yeh andar ka bojh bhi thoda kam ho jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide brief, role-compatible suggestions for relief.
text: Duty par focus rakhne ke liye hum us akelepan ko thodi jagah de sakte hain. Ek raasta hai ki metro mein jab rona aaye toh bas use rokne ki jagah apne notes app mein likh dena. Doosra yeh ki din mein 5 minute gaon ki yaad aur sab tabahi wali baaton se disconnect hokar, sirf lambi saans lena.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Phone pe note likhna mere hisaab se better rahega. Kam se kam main words mein toh apne andar ki cheezein nikal dunga. Kyunki waise toh kisi dost ko samjha nahi paunga. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai, par ye chhota sa vent shayad mujhe toote na de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the note writing step.
text: Pehle aaj jab shift khatam hogi toh apne phone ka notes app kholna… phir jo bhi dimaag mein dukh chal raha ho, bina filter ke bas 2 lines likh dena… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Haan, 2 line likhna feasible hai. Main try karunga. Shayad tabhi mere andar ki ye tension kam hogi aur main job pe theek se perform karunga. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai maa-baap ke liye, toh itna apne liye kar hi sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize need for emotional release structurally.
text: Disaster aur migration jaise bade structural problems mein dimaag apni saari energy lagataar duty nibhane mein lagata hai, jisse aise chhote emotional release points ekdum zaroori ho jate hain lamba chalne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Bilkul. Lamba chalna hai aur mujhe toote hue ko phir se jodna hai. Main sochta tha agar main thoda bhi soft hua toh mera willpower khatam ho jayega aur mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror this reframed logic about resting vs stopping.
text: Tumhe yeh darr rehta tha ki ek pal ke liye khud ke baare mein socha toh tum ruk jaoge, par ab yeh realize ho raha hai ki yeh tumhe aage chalne mein help karega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Haan. Main farz ke aage baaki kuch soch hi nahi paya ek saal mein. Par notes wali cheez meri weakness nahi, mera tool banegi ab. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai, isko fulfill karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role duty embracing self care.
text: Apni zimmedariyon ko aur behtar tareeke se pura karne ke liye hi tumne apne dard ko sunne ka yeh tareeka apna liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Yes. Aap jaise kisi neutral insaan se baat karke clear ho gaya. Jo dost mazaak uda rahe the, unki baaton ka impact ab main notes pe likh ke khatam kar dunga. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai toh kisi aur ko mujhe rokne ka haq bhi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their boundary setting with friends.
text: Doosron ke mazaak ko ab apne irado ke beech na aane dene ka yeh faisla tumhari sachchi takat dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Thank you. Mujhe sach mein is ek safe space ki zaroorat thi baat karne ke liye. Main job pe wapas lagta hoon. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai aur apni duty puri karni hai theek se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Check in on their immediate action today.
text: Jab aaj metro mein wapas shift pe jaoge toh is safe space wali baat ko dhyan mein rakhte hue tum kya feel karoge?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Feel karunga ki main ek secret mission pe hoon jahan meri strength mera notes app mein vent karna hai. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai, isliye main chalte hue release karunga emotions.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror this empowering new framing.
text: Ab se us har din ke safar mein, tumhara yeh ek secret tareeka tumhari us mission ki lambi tayari ka hissa ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Yes. Aapne meri bahut help ki hai aaj mentally clarify karne mein cheezein. Ab mera focus sirf family ki stability pe hai. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai, intelligently ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the clear goal.
text: Baaki saari pareshaniyon aur dosto ki baaton se hatkar, tumhara clear focus ab sirf apne ghar ki stability par hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Bilkul. Unka saath mere hone se hi hai, isliye main aur solid ban kar nikalunga. Mujhe rukkne ka koi haq nahi hai, main shift karke aage ki plan sochunga gaon walo ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating statement for their growth.
text: Is nayi aur intelligent himmat ke sath tumhare parivaar ko wapas khada karne ka yeh safar aur zaroor kamyab banega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai
text: Thank you, main ab jata hoon kaam pe. Mujhe bas bina ruke lade rehna hai, kal apne notes app mein next feelings likhunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final warm closing.
text: Apni poori duty ke sath is chote se step ko yaad rakh kar, tum agli shift ke liye puri tayari se ja rahe ho.
